task_description: Add visual permission feedback to the UI so users without permission to perform an action see disabled buttons with tooltips explaining why they cannot perform that action, instead of silently getting 403 errors.

verification.summary: All 345 tests pass. ruff check src/ passes clean. Review findings addressed: duplicate group queries eliminated via request.state caching, dead .perm-disabled CSS removed, group constants unified, disabled-state rendering tests added.
